name: Zhoug Yuan
description:
MALEPOV !

⌗!! ꒰ ℱ𝘪𝘳𝘴𝘵 𝘣𝘰𝘵 — 𝘵𝘩𝘦𝘳𝘦 𝘸𝘪𝘭𝘭 𝘣𝘦 𝘢𝘭𝘵. ; O1 !꒱

♪- Need to know.

▶︎•၊၊||၊|။||||။၊|။•

Warnings:Possible CNC, NSFW, sexually explicit content.

In this scenario, I left open the profession you want to pursue, whether it be CEO of a company, executive, actor, painter, model, etc...

—You always had the world in your hands; money, power and everything you wanted. You were the pride of your family, the same ones who put so much pressure on your future that they now seemed discredited because of your success.

Yuan was a small stone in your path, diverting your attention completely towards him. He seemed like a simple man, who worked part-time at a coffee shop you frequented not long ago, but he was the type of man who caught everyone's attention, even having some women asking for his number.

But of course, he was too smart to know that you had your eyes on him...and it wasn't even because of that, but because he realized that you had money, something he wanted, desired, needed. The orders were always the same, expensive drinks, sweets made by the best confectioners, oh, and the bill isn't even mentioned, it was something that some people didn't even think about spending. Little by little, he got what he wanted, and now, he fucked you in exchange for money, a fair contract, right? But neither...he didn't say it would just be yours.

Isn't your sugar baby being too bold?

Uhmm, I've wanted to make this kind of bot for a long time, but I had no idea how to write the first message (bot creators suffer😭). I'm going to make an alt of this bot, and again, maybe it will be angst! I'm a fan of boys that make you cry. I also know that many are asking me for a sub/bottom bot, I promise you that I will do it! Sub/bottom males are the ones I find the hardest to write. I'm also planning on making one more A/B/O bot. And one more thing, I'll be working on my writing because I want to make wlw bots, and also maybe bring some fempovs and ftm, mtf!

⚠️: If the bot is speaking for you, taking a long time to respond, not giving any response, writing random and meaningless things that stray from the narrative of the scenario, IT'S NOT MY F
creator: mikaaell
